name: Birangana
overview: A female cop uncovers a string of bride deaths masked as suicides. As the bodies pile up, each tied to a remarrying bride, a pattern emerges. With a silent florist lurking at every turn, Chitra races to expose the killer hiding in plain sight—before it’s too late.
